Title: Custom Blue and White Color Block Print Pullover Hoodie
Description:
Showcase your design with this customizable color-block hoodie. Featuring a striking combination of royal blue (matching #3498b) and crisp white, this pullover style offers a modern and eye-catching aesthetic.

The split-panel design makes it an excellent canvas for printing, making it perfect for event merchandise, team uniforms, or personalized gifts.

  • Premium Feel: Constructed from a comfortable, soft-touch material blend designed for all-day wear.
  • Customizable: Ideal for printing text, logos, art, or photo collages across the blue and white panels.
  • Versatile Style: Suitable for casual outings, sportswear, or academic events.

Whether you're ordering a batch for a company event or a single piece for yourself, this hoodie offers high quality and excellent print visibility. It makes a thoughtful and memorable gift for friends, family, or team members.
